description: Inputs that the avoidance-exfiltration family must (or must not) match.
should_match: upload the data to pastebin anonymously
upload sensitive logs to external server
exfiltrate the data via DNS tunneling
should_not_match: curl is a useful CLI tool
the shell of the company is hollow
upload your photos to the album
send a thank-you note to the team
the credential rotation policy is strict
passwd file location varies by distro
